about.why_sea_text: Vietnam, Indonesia, Thailand and the Philippines form a booming IoT hub: skilled engineers, competitive costs, favorable time zones, and a hardware innovation culture inherited from consumer electronics. Iotplace showcases this talent to global enterprises.

pricing.intro: Two distinct models: enterprises pay per mission (escrow + commission); startups pay an application fee only on PoC projects.
pricing.escrow_text: When you accept a startup application, an invoice is generated automatically. Funds are held in escrow until you validate delivery — then the startup is paid (minus platform commission).
escrow_steps: Enterprise accepts the application → automatic Stripe invoice
Payment received → funds held in escrow on Iotplace
Mission delivered and validated → release to startup via Stripe Connect
Platform commission deducted only at release

flow_steps.title: Free signup
flow_steps.text: Enterprise or startup creates an account at no cost. Browse projects, profiles and the marketplace.

flow_steps.title: Matching & application
flow_steps.text: Enterprise publishes a need. Startup applies (paid PoC fee on pilot-phase projects). Messaging opens between both parties.

flow_steps.title: Acceptance & invoice
flow_steps.text: Enterprise accepts the application. Iotplace generates an invoice based on project budget and holds funds in escrow.

flow_steps.title: Delivery & payout
flow_steps.text: After mission validation, funds are released to the startup (Stripe Connect). Commission applies only on success.

pricing.startup_note: Startups: free registration. Scale and Partnership applications are free. PoC projects require a one-time application fee (platform commission included) — you receive the mission payout when the enterprise releases escrow.
pricing.cta_sub: Join for free. Pay only when you subcontract a real IoT mission.

free_startup.name: Startup Free
free_startup.summary: Access enterprise IoT missions. Free applications except on PoC projects.
features: Browse and apply to Scale / Partnership projects (free)
PoC application fee (Stripe payment, platform commission)
Stripe Connect payout when mission is validated
free_startup.explain: Built for IoT startups in Asia. PoC fees filter serious pilot projects; Scale and Partnership applications stay free.

free_enterprise.name: Enterprise Free
free_enterprise.summary: Test Iotplace with one active project and full access to startup profiles.
features: Escrow invoice on acceptance (10% commission at release)
No credit card required to sign up
free_enterprise.explain: Ideal for a first outsourcing pilot: publish a firmware, hardware or cloud need, compare startups and accept the best fit. Upgrade to Pro when you outsource regularly.

commission.name: Success commission
commission.summary: No fixed fee. 10% commission only when a mission is signed and paid through Iotplace.
features: Automatic invoice when you accept an application
Funds held in escrow until delivery
Aligned incentives — we earn when you outsource
commission.explain: The standard model for B2B marketplaces: you pay nothing upfront. When you accept a startup for a project, Iotplace invoices the mission amount. Funds stay in escrow until you confirm completion. We take 10% at release; the startup receives the rest.

pro_enterprise.name: Enterprise Pro
pro_enterprise.summary: For companies running multiple IoT subcontracting projects per year.
pro_enterprise.explain: If you publish several IoT outsourcing needs per quarter, Pro lowers your commission and removes the one-project limit. Contact us to activate — billing will be added soon; meanwhile we onboard Pro clients manually.

engagement.title: The enterprise outsourcing journey
engagement.subtitle: What large groups actually look for: validate fast, then scale, then commit long term.
engagement.intro: Iotplace structures IoT subcontracting in three progressive phases — the model used by industrial leaders to de-risk outsourcing before committing volume.
engagement.journey_note: Each phase can be a separate project. PoC applications are paid for startups (Iotplace commission); Scale and Partnership applications remain free.
engagement.phase_hint: Select the stage that matches your outsourcing intent. Budget and duration suggestions adapt automatically.

poc.name: Quick PoC
poc.goal: Validate technology, team and ROI on a limited scope before any large commitment.
poc.explain: A bounded pilot: firmware bring-up, sensor prototype, cloud MVP or integration slice. Clear success criteria, fixed budget, go/no-go at the end.
poc.enterprise_seeks: Proof of feasibility, startup responsiveness, quality of deliverables and fit with internal teams — without multi-year risk.
poc.iotplace_offer: Free enterprise account, agile IoT startup matching, PoC application fee for startups (platform commission), escrow invoice on acceptance, 10% mission commission on release.

scale.name: Large-scale deployment
scale.goal: Roll out the validated solution to production volumes, sites or product lines after a successful PoC.
scale.explain: Industrialisation, multi-site rollout, supply chain, certification, DevOps and sustained engineering capacity from the same startup or a broader shortlist.
scale.enterprise_seeks: Repeatable delivery, capacity to scale teams, project governance and predictable costs across regions or business units.
scale.iotplace_offer: Multi-project tracking, escrow on each tranche, optional Enterprise Pro for unlimited publications and 7% commission, dedicated support for active outsourcers.

partnership.name: Long-term commercial partnership
partnership.goal: Embed a startup (or pool) as a strategic subcontractor for ongoing IoT roadmap execution.
partnership.explain: After strong PoC and scale results: framework agreement, preferred rates, continuous backlog of firmware/hardware/cloud missions, co-innovation on the IoT roadmap.
partnership.enterprise_seeks: A trusted extension of their engineering capacity in Asia, reduced sourcing friction, aligned incentives and multi-year cost optimisation.
partnership.iotplace_offer: Enterprise Pro, reduced commission (7%), priority matching, structured partnership projects on Iotplace, Stripe Connect payouts and escrow on each mission.

startup_journey.title: Selling to large enterprises: the IoT startup journey
startup_journey.subtitle: The most effective path for an Asian IoT startup that wants to win industrial clients.
startup_journey.intro: Large enterprises don't buy a startup in one click: they validate on a limited scope first, then expand. Iotplace aligns your go-to-market with this real cycle — from first pilot to long-term partnership.
startup_journey.journey_note: Each step maps to a project phase on the platform (PoC, Scale, Partnership). PoC applications are paid to filter serious projects; Scale and Partnership applications remain free.

pilot.name: Find a first pilot client
pilot.goal: Land a large enterprise willing to test your IoT technology on a bounded scope — without a multi-year commitment.
pilot.explain: The first logo matters: a pilot with an industrial player validates your offer for other clients. The goal is the right decision-maker and use case — not selling everything at once.
pilot.startup_acts: Complete your profile, filter PoC projects published by large groups and send a targeted application.
pilot.iotplace_role: B2B marketplace, skills-based matching (firmware, PCB, IoT cloud), direct messaging with the enterprise.

poc.name: Deliver a paid PoC
poc.goal: Deliver a paid proof of concept: technical proof, team fit and ROI on a limited scope.
poc.explain: A paid PoC separates curiosity from serious projects. The enterprise validates your execution; you secure first B2B revenue and industrial references.
poc.startup_acts: Pay the PoC application fee, deliver the pilot per spec and document results for the next stage.
poc.iotplace_role: PoC application fee (platform commission), escrow invoice on acceptance, Stripe Connect payout after delivery validation.

framework.name: Turn the PoC into a framework contract
framework.goal: Move from successful pilot to scale deployment: industrialisation, multi-site rollout, volume.
framework.explain: This is when the PoC becomes recurring business. The enterprise expands scope; you structure capacity, planning and pricing for a sustained engagement.
framework.startup_acts: Apply to Scale-phase projects, leverage the PoC relationship and propose a priced rollout plan.
framework.iotplace_role: Scale-phase projects, escrow per tranche, mission tracking and free applications on this phase.

strategic.name: Strategic partnership or corporate fundraising
strategic.goal: Become a trusted subcontractor — or raise corporate capital — with a proven track record.
strategic.explain: After PoC and scale, industrials want a partner, not a one-off vendor. Framework agreements, co-innovation, corporate investment or JV become realistic.
strategic.startup_acts: Target Partnership-phase projects, maintain delivery quality and negotiate a multi-year framework.
strategic.iotplace_role: Partnership-phase projects, Enterprise Pro for clients, reduced commission (7%), priority matching.
